findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "lookup_password_strength" references sensitive artifacts (password). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: Score a password's strength (zxcvbn-style). Pass ?password=... as query. Use for security UX agents. Example call: {"query_string": "password=Tr0ub4dor&3"} Cost…

list_endpoints
description.description: List all paid endpoints exposed by this MCP server with their prices and live status. Free — no wallet required. Use this first to discover what tools are available.

description.name: pricing_info
description.description: Return pricing details for the GoCreative Agent API — base price per call, premium endpoints, cache TTLs, and supported payment networks. Free.

description.name: wallet_helper
description.description: Return step-by-step instructions for setting up x402 USDC autopay for this MCP server. Use this if a paid tool returned a 402 error or you're onboarding a new agent that needs to pay for API calls. Free.

description.name: install_snippets
description.description: Return ready-to-paste configuration snippets for installing this MCP server in Claude Code, Cursor, Cline, Continue.dev, Windsurf, and Zed. Free.

description.name: usage_stats
description.description: Return summary stats of how this MCP server has been used (top tools called, success rate, recent activity). Free. Use to verify your own integration is hitting the right tools.

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: enrich_browserbase, search_instagram_hashtag, posts_x, lookup_hn, lookup_weather, lookup_arxiv, lookup_youtube, lookup_reddit, lookup_bluesky, lookup_steam, lookup_lemmy, lookup_random_image, lookup_unsplash_search, lookup_email_validate, lookup_pagespeed, lookup_mxrecords, lookup_spfrecord, scrape_amazon, scrape_yelp, scrape_glassdoor, scrape_producthunt, scrape_reddit, scrape_etsy, scrape_tripadvisor, scrape_substack, scrape_telegram, scrape_fbpage, scrape_goodreads, scrape_steam, scrape_appstore · Private data: ai_ask, ai_pro, ai_ultra, bundle_domain_360, lookup_whois, lookup_dns, lookup_weather, lookup_github_gist, lookup_json_validate, lookup_password_strength, lookup_email_validate, lookup_jwt_decode, lookup_ipinfo, lookup_mxrecords, lookup_spfrecord, extract_document, scrape_uniswap, list_endpoints, wallet_helper · Public sink: ai_ask, bundle_email_360, enrich_tiktok, enrich_x, lookup_dns, lookup_reddit, lookup_bluesky, lookup_random_user, lookup_geocode, lookup_json_validate, lookup_email_validate, lookup_mxrecords, lookup_spfrecord, scrape_reddit · Destructive: lookup_postal, lookup_base64, lookup_lighthouse.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: enrich_browserbase, search_instagram_hashtag, posts_x, lookup_hn, lookup_weather, lookup_arxiv, lookup_youtube, lookup_reddit, lookup_bluesky, lookup_steam, lookup_lemmy, lookup_random_image, lookup_unsplash_search, lookup_email_validate, lookup_pagespeed, lookup_mxrecords, lookup_spfrecord, scrape_amazon, scrape_yelp, scrape_glassdoor, scrape_producthunt, scrape_reddit, scrape_etsy, scrape_tripadvisor, scrape_substack, scrape_telegram, scrape_fbpage, scrape_goodreads, scrape_steam, scrape_appstore · Private data: ai_ask, ai_pro, ai_ultra, bundle_domain_360, lookup_whois, lookup_dns, lookup_weather, lookup_github_gist, lookup_json_validate, lookup_password_strength, lookup_email_validate, lookup_jwt_decode, lookup_ipinfo, lookup_mxrecords, lookup_spfrecord, extract_document, scrape_uniswap, list_endpoints, wallet_helper · Public sink: ai_ask, bundle_email_360, enrich_tiktok, enrich_x, lookup_dns, lookup_reddit, lookup_bluesky, lookup_random_user, lookup_geocode, lookup_json_validate, lookup_email_validate, lookup_mxrecords, lookup_spfrecord, scrape_reddit · Destructive: lookup_postal, lookup_base64, lookup_lighthouse

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
